hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

root=${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; skill="$root/.claude/skills/search-toolchain/scripts/search_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$skill" ]; then fb="${ARTAGON_SKILLS_ROOT:-$HOME/Projects/Artagon/artagon-ai-skills}"; case "$fb" in "$HOME"/*) skill="$fb/skills/search-toolchain/scripts/search_hook.py";; *) exit 0;; esac; fi; [ -f "$skill" ] || exit 0; SEARCH_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT="$root" python3 "$skill" claude
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.env' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Blocked: .env files are protected"}' && exit 1 || exit 0; }
